message:
refactor: Integrate comptime opcode handlers into codegen

- Replace manual arithmetic switch cases (.add, .sub, .mul, .div, .mod)
  with comptime-generated code from opcode_handlers.zig
- Replace manual comparison switch cases (.lt, .lte, .gt, .gte, .eq, .neq)
  with comptime-generated code
- Reduces boilerplate: when QuickJS-NG updates opcodes, only need to
  regenerate opcodes.zig, handlers auto-generate from patterns
- Verified: fib(40) = 102334155 still correct
